policy_note: Team-lead authorised pinning pre-existing failures as orthogonal to story 01. Verifier gate: zero NEW failures beyond the pinned list. Fewer failures is fine. See team-lead message at 2026-05-06T07:36 (re-run instruction) and 2026-05-06T~08:18 (loosen and proceed).

runs.note: Run after make e2e-down/e2e-up clean restart per team-lead. Same failure cluster reproduced — failures are deterministic, not flaky.

pre_existing_failures.title: Admin propagation – every invited member becomes admin › Users B and C publish KeyPackages
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Test polls strfry for kind 443 KeyPackage events. Production migrated to kind 30443 (parameterised replaceable) per commit e13500e (chore(deps): upgrade marmot-ts to 0.5.1). groups-cancel-pending.spec.ts:51 was updated to [443, 30443] but this spec was missed. One-line test fix: change `kinds: [443]` at groups-admin.spec.ts:40 to `kinds: [443, 30443]`. Cascades 7 cascade-skips in describe.serial.

pre_existing_failures.title: DM reactions — outbound and inbound (AC-46) › Alice sends a DM reaction; Bob sees the badge; Alice removes it; badge disappears
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Likely regression from commit 3dcc481 (feat(chat): add emoji picker, message reactions, and migrate DMs to NIP-17/59). Out of scope for this epic.

pre_existing_failures.title: DM reactions — outbound and inbound (AC-46) › AC-60: only kind-1059 events on the wire — no kind-7 plaintext
DM reactions UI — story-08 › AC-47+AC-49: DM reaction trigger visible on hover; picker opens; badge appears via bridge
Groups Identity › Kind 443 KeyPackages published to relay
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Same root cause as groups-admin.spec.ts:119. Polls kind 443 only at line 61.

pre_existing_failures.title: Image Sharing › AC-60: User A attaches image and sends; User B sees image-thumbnail
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Image upload pipeline failure. Out of scope for this epic.

pre_existing_failures.title: Group Lifecycle › User B initializes and publishes KeyPackages
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Same root cause as groups-admin.spec.ts:119. Polls kind 443 only at line 68.

pre_existing_failures.title: Group Reactions — story-06 › Bob reacts to Alice's message — Alice sees the badge (AC-40)
Group Reactions UI — story-08 › AC-49+AC-51+AC-56: use picker to react; badge appears with own-reaction highlight; click removes it
pre_existing_failures.note: Run #1 had groups-reactions.spec.ts:286 (AC-48 picker opens) instead. Run #2 hit a different reactions test. Both are within the same cluster.

pre_existing_failures.title: Group of 3 – hub invite (A invites B and C) › Users B and C publish KeyPackages
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Same root cause. Polls kind 443 only at line 48.

pre_existing_failures.title: Group of 3 – sequential invite (A→B, B joins, A→C) › Users B and C publish KeyPackages
pre_existing_failures.diagnosis: Same root cause. Polls kind 443 only at line 48.

pre_existing_failures_run_1_only.title: Group Reactions UI — story-08 › AC-48: picker opens on trigger click; closes on Escape; closes on glyph select
pre_existing_failures_run_1_only.note: Failed run #1, did-not-run/passed in run #2. Cluster-level flake within reactions UI. Treat as pinned at cluster granularity.

pre_existing_failures_run_1_only.title: Score Sync via MLS › User A completes quiz and score is published
Seed Phrase Backup & Restore › Generate 12-word mnemonic

failure_acceptance.rationale: These failures are pinned as orthogonal to story 01 per team-lead direction (msg 2026-05-06T~08:18 'loosen the baseline and proceed'). Story 01 changes only the wire format of the kind-0 profile rumor (sign and verify embedded SignedProfileEvent) plus 5 call-site updates in MarmotContext.tsx. None of the failing test clusters touch profile sync paths.
failure_acceptance.verifier_gate: Zero NEW failures introduced beyond this pinned set. A failure with the same spec:line is treated as pinned. A new failure (different spec:line, or a previously passing test now failing) is a regression and must be remediated.
